zh.Holkham, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可霍爾哈姆
zh.Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England: 英國賀特福爾福拉姆斯亞德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Tosny IV於大約1135年出生在英國賀特福爾福拉姆斯亞德時，他的父親Roger de Tosny III32歲，母親Gertrude de Hainault27歲。他和Baroness Isabel Leicester至少有1個兒子。他去世於大約1185年在英國諾福爾可霍爾哈姆享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Tosny IV于大约1135年出生在英国賀特福爾福拉姆斯亞德时，他的父亲Roger de Tosny III32岁，母亲Gertrude de Hainault27岁。他和Baroness Isabel Leicester至少有1个儿子。他去世于大约1185年在英国諾福爾可霍爾哈姆享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tosny
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Jean Pierre.
Americanized form of any of various surnames ultimately derived from the Latin personal name Antonius (see Anthony ), for example Greek Antoniou and Italian Toni .
French: from the personal name Tony, a pet form of Antonin (from Latin Antoninus, a derivative of Antonius; see Anthony ).

variants.name: Anthony
meanings: English and West Indian (mainly Antigua and Barbuda, Saint Lucia, and Trinidad and Tobago, also Dutch Caribbean): from the personal name Anthony, Latin Antonius, which, with its variants and cognates, is one of the commonest personal names in Europe. Spellings with -h-, which first appear in English in the 16th century and in French (as Anthoine) at about the same time, are due to the erroneous belief that the name derives from Greek anthos ‘flower’. The popularity of the personal name in Christendom is largely due to the cult of the Egyptian hermit Saint Anthony ( AD 251–356), who in his old age gathered a community of hermits around him, and for that reason is regarded by some as the founder of monasticism. It was further increased by the fame of Saint Anthony of Padua (1195–1231), who long enjoyed a great popular cult and who is believed to help people find lost things. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates and derivatives (patronymics) from other languages, for example Greek patronymic Antoniades , Italian Antoni , Polish Antoniewicz , Croatian and Serbian Antonović (see Antonovich ) and Antunović; see also below. The name Anthony is also found among Christians in southern India, but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Antony .

German, Flemish, and French (mainly Alsace): Latinized (humanistic) patronymic from local equivalents of the Latin personal name Antonius, from its genitive form Antoni(i). In North America, this surname is also an altered form of the German, Dutch, French, and Slovak cognates Antoni 1 and Antony 2.
History: John Anthony of Hampstead, Middlesex, England (now part of north London) migrated to Boston, MA, in 1634. By 1640 he had moved to Providence, RI, where his descendants are still established.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Tosny IV was born about 1135, in Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England, his father, Roger de Tosny III, was 32 and his mother, Gertrude de Hainault, was 27. He had at least 1 son with Baroness Isabel Leicester. He died about 1185, in Holkham, Norfolk, England, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Tosny IV est né environ 1135, à Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Tosny III, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Gertrude de Hainault, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Baroness Isabel Leicester. Il est décédé environ 1185, à Holkham, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Tosny IV um 1135 in Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Tosny III 32 und seine Mutter Gertrude de Hainault 27. Er hatte mit Baroness Isabel Leicester mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1185 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Holkham, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Tosny IV è nato il circa 1135 nel Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, Roger de Tosny III, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Gertrude de Hainault, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Baroness Isabel Leicester. Morì circa 1185, nel Holkham, Norfolk, England, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Tosny IVが約1135年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアフラムステアドで生まれた時，父Roger de Tosny IIIは32歳，母Gertrude de Hainaultは27歳であった。彼はBaroness Isabel Leicesterとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1185年にイギリスノーフォルクホールクハムで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Tosny IV(이)가 대략 1135년 영국 허트퍼드실르 플램스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Tosny III(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Gertrude de Hainault(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Baroness Isabel Leicester(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1185년 영국 노르폴크 홀카에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1135–about 1185: tany ho any amin'ny 1135–tany ho any amin'ny 1185

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Tosny IV nasceu aproximadamente 1135, em Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Tosny III, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Gertrude de Hainault, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Baroness Isabel Leicester. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1185, em Holkham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Tosny IV родился около 1135 г. в местности флэмстид, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger de Tosny III было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Gertrude de Hainault, 27. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Baroness Isabel Leicester. Он умер около 1185 г. в местности холхам, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 52 лет.

sm.about 1135–about 1185: e tusa o le 1135–e tusa o le 1185

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de Tosny IV nació aproximadamente 1135, en Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Tosny III, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Gertrude de Hainault, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Baroness Isabel Leicester. Murió aproximadamente 1185, en Holkham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años.
